processing_activity: Zimbabwe Law AI 2022 evidence dataset compilation and controlled research access
purpose: Legal editorial drafting, source verification, search and quality assurance
processor: To be completed for each hosting or API provider
data_subjects: Litigants; witnesses; minors; practitioners; judicial officers; public officials; other persons in judgments

security_controls: Private repository; RBAC; MFA; encryption; hashes; logs; review gates
